name: Basil Cream
recipeIngredient: 1/4 Cup shallots or green onions, chopped
2 Cups rich shellfish stock OR 2 Cups rich chicken stock
1/2 cup Italian Roma tomatoes, peeled, seeded, and diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Add shallots and garlic to a saucepan and sauté in oil until soft but not brown.
2. Add wine, stock, and fennel seed; bring to a boil and reduce by half.
3. Add cream; reduce to a light sauce consistency.
4. Strain the mixture and add it to a blender or food processor.
5. Blanch basil leaves momentarily in boiling salted water, then plunge immediately into ice water to stop cooking and set the color. Pat dry.
6. Add blanched basil, parsley, and mint leaves to the blender; process until smooth.
7. Return the contents to the saucepan and keep warm.
8. Correct seasoning with salt, pepper, and drops of lemon juice.
9. Stir in tomatoes and serve immediately.
